g.title: permission.usr_object_perm_map:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: permission.usr_object_perm_map:perm->permission.perm_list:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (perm) REFERENCES permission.perm_list(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
